summary: Dual Edition ePaper Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All dual edition features verified working - AM/PM toggle, date picker with slot indicators, archive with AM/PM buttons, masthead edition labels.

passed_tests: GET /api/epaper/editions returns editions with 'slot' field (morning/evening) and 'article_count'
GET /api/epaper/editions has both morning and evening editions available
GET /api/epaper/{date}?slot=morning returns Morning Edition with correct title 'Kaizer News - Morning Edition'
GET /api/epaper/{date}?slot=evening returns Evening Edition with correct title 'Kaizer News - Evening Edition'
GET /api/epaper/{date}?slot=morning&lang=te returns Telugu Morning Edition (ఉదయం ఎడిషన్)
GET /api/epaper/{date}?slot=evening&lang=te returns Telugu Evening Edition (సాయంత్రం ఎడిషన్)
GET /api/epaper/{date} without slot param still works (backward compatible, defaults to evening)
Morning and evening editions have different article counts (time-based filtering works)
GET /api/epaper/{date}/pdf?slot=morning returns PDF for morning edition with correct filename
GET /api/epaper/{date}/pdf?slot=evening returns PDF for evening edition with correct filename
GET /api/epaper/{date}/pdf without slot still works
GET /api/scraper/status returns status with last_run info
GET /api/health returns ok
Morning edition pages have proper structure (key, title, articles)
Evening edition pages have proper structure
Articles in editions have required fields (id, title, summary, category)
Frontend: ePaper page loads at /epaper
Frontend: AM/PM toggle visible in toolbar
Frontend: AM button active shows red background (#c41e1e)
Frontend: PM button clickable and switches edition
Frontend: Date picker dropdown shows AM/PM indicators (sun/moon icons) per edition
Frontend: Date picker shows article count per slot
Frontend: Archive section shows 'Previous Editions' with description
Frontend: Archive date cards have AM/PM buttons with article counts
Frontend: Clicking archive AM/PM button loads correct edition and scrolls to top
Frontend: Masthead shows 'MORNING EDITION' text on morning editions
Frontend: Masthead shows 'EVENING EDITION' text on evening editions
Frontend: Page count changes between morning (2 pages) and evening (3 pages) for same date

critical_code_review_comments: Dual edition implementation correctly uses IST timezone for slot classification
Morning: prev day 6 PM IST -> current day 8 AM IST, Evening: 8 AM IST -> 6 PM IST
classify_article_slot() function handles UTC to IST conversion correctly
get_slot_utc_range() generates correct UTC timestamps for database queries
Frontend toolbar AM/PM toggle uses data-testid attributes for testing
Archive section properly groups editions by date with AM/PM button options
Masthead component receives slot prop and displays correct edition label
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 2026-03-05 has both morning (53 articles) and evening (67 articles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dual edition ePaper feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints support optional ?slot=morning|evening parameter. Frontend has AM/PM toggle in toolbar, date picker with slot indicators, and archive section with AM/PM buttons per date. Masthead displays 'MORNING EDITION' or 'EVENING EDITION' text. Test date 2026-03-05 has both editions available for testing.

slot_classification.morning: prev day 18:00 IST to current day 08:00 IST
slot_classification.evening: current day 08:00 IST to current day 18:00 IST
